summary: The Check Changelog Entry job failed because the CI emitted an error stating the PR would target v1.16 and requires an addition (likely a changelog entry).
root_cause: CI reported: "Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...", indicating the PR needs an added changelog entry or an adjusted release target.

evidence.quote: 2026-04-23T09:06:25.3001661Z ##[error]Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...
evidence.reason: This is the explicit error emitted by the CI that caused the job to fail.
The warnings reference a changelog-related comment string, supporting that the check enforces changelog content.
Shows the presence of at least one error entry in the log summary for this job.

suggested_fix: Add the required changelog entry to the PR (or adjust the PR's release target) so the check no longer reports "Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...".
